# Figure 5: MOA–MOA synergy heatmap between our predicted TB HDTs and current TB antibiotics
# Kewalin Samart
# Last modified: 03/12/2026

```{r load libraries}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)
```

```{r define predicted drugs + TB antibiotics}
predicted_drugs <- read_tsv(
  here("results/final_high_confidence_drug_predictions.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)$drug_name |>
  tolower()

tbmedications <- c(
  "rifampin","isoniazid","pyrazinamide","ethambutol",
  "kanamycin","streptomycin","capreomycin","amikacin",
  "levofloxacin","moxifloxacin","gatifloxacin",
  "bedaquiline","delamanid","linezolid","pretomanid"
)

predicted_drugs <- union(predicted_drugs, tbmedications)
```

```{r obtain DrugCombDB voting-based synergy scores}
drugs_synergy_df <- read.csv(
  here("figures/figure5/20240724DrugCombDB_Syner&Antag_voting.csv")
) %>%
  mutate(
    Drug1 = tolower(Drug1),
    Drug2 = tolower(Drug2),
    vote_sum = ZIPclassification +
               blissclassification +
               loeweclassification +
               hsaclassification,
    final_call = case_when(
      vote_sum >=  3 ~ "Synergy",
      vote_sum <= -3 ~ "Antagonism",
      TRUE           ~ "Mixed"
    )
  )
```

```{r get unique unordered drug pairs}
drug_pair_summary <- drugs_synergy_df %>%
  mutate(
    DrugA = pmin(Drug1, Drug2),
    DrugB = pmax(Drug1, Drug2)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    DrugA %in% predicted_drugs,
    DrugB %in% predicted_drugs
  ) %>%
  group_by(DrugA, DrugB) %>%
  summarise(
    final_pair_call = case_when(
      mean(final_call == "Synergy")    >= 0.5 ~ "Synergy",
      mean(final_call == "Antagonism") >= 0.5 ~ "Antagonism",
      TRUE                                   ~ "Mixed"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(pair_id = paste(DrugA, DrugB, sep = "||"))
```

```{r map drugs to MOAs}
drug_moa_df <- read_csv(
  here("data/metadata/repurposing_drugs_20200324.csv"),
  skip = 9,
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(pert_iname = tolower(pert_iname))

split_moas <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x) || x == "") return(character(0))
  str_split(x, "\\|")[[1]] |> str_trim()
}

drug_to_moas <- drug_moa_df %>%
  distinct(pert_iname, moa) %>%
  group_by(pert_iname) %>%
  summarise(
    moas = list(unique(unlist(lapply(moa, split_moas)))),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# attach MOA sets to drug pairs
pairs_with_moas <- drug_pair_summary %>%
  left_join(drug_to_moas, by = c("DrugA" = "pert_iname")) %>%
  rename(MOAs_A = moas) %>%
  left_join(drug_to_moas, by = c("DrugB" = "pert_iname")) %>%
  rename(MOAs_B = moas) %>%
  filter(lengths(MOAs_A) > 0, lengths(MOAs_B) > 0)
```

```{r make sure each drug pair contributes once per unordered MOA–MOA}
moa_edges_from_pairs <- pairs_with_moas %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    moa_pairs = list({
      expand_grid(MOA1 = MOAs_A, MOA2 = MOAs_B) %>%
        filter(MOA1 != MOA2) %>%
        mutate(
          MOA_A = pmin(MOA1, MOA2),
          MOA_B = pmax(MOA1, MOA2)
        ) %>%
        distinct(MOA_A, MOA_B)
    })
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(pair_id, final_pair_call, moa_pairs) %>%
  unnest(moa_pairs)

# unify MOA labels
canonicalize_moa <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_trim() %>%
    str_squish()
}

moa_pair_summary <- moa_edges_from_pairs %>%
  mutate(
    MOA_A = canonicalize_moa(MOA_A),
    MOA_B = canonicalize_moa(MOA_B)
  ) %>%
  group_by(MOA_A, MOA_B) %>%
  summarise(
    n_drug_pairs = n_distinct(pair_id),
    n_synergy    = sum(final_pair_call == "Synergy"),
    n_antagonism = sum(final_pair_call == "Antagonism"),
    frac_synergy    = n_synergy    / n_drug_pairs,
    frac_antagonism = n_antagonism / n_drug_pairs,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r define symmetric matrix builder (A–B == B–A)}
build_sym_mat <- function(df, value_col, fill = 0) {

  df_sym <- df %>%
    mutate(
      M1 = pmin(MOA_A, MOA_B),
      M2 = pmax(MOA_A, MOA_B)
    ) %>%
    group_by(M1, M2) %>%
    summarise(value = mean(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
              .groups = "drop")

  all_moas <- sort(unique(c(df_sym$M1, df_sym$M2)))

  mat <- expand_grid(M1 = all_moas, M2 = all_moas) %>%
    left_join(df_sym, by = c("M1", "M2")) %>%
    left_join(df_sym, by = c("M1" = "M2", "M2" = "M1"),
              suffix = c("", "_rev")) %>%
    mutate(value = coalesce(value, value_rev, fill)) %>%
    select(M1, M2, value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = M2, values_from = value) %>%
    column_to_rownames("M1") %>%
    as.matrix()

  stopifnot(all.equal(mat, t(mat)))
  mat
}

moa_synergy_mat <- build_sym_mat(moa_pair_summary, "frac_synergy", 0)
```

```{r mask current TB antibiotics}
# identify TB-related MOAs
tb_moas <- drug_to_moas %>%
  filter(pert_iname %in% tbmedications) %>%
  pull(moas) %>%
  unlist() %>%
  canonicalize_moa() %>%
  unique()

# build MOA labels of current TB antibiotics with asterisk
all_moas <- rownames(moa_synergy_mat)

moa_labels <- ifelse(
  all_moas %in% tb_moas,
  paste0(all_moas, "*"),
  all_moas
)
names(moa_labels) <- all_moas
```

```{r define rows/columns order}
# clusting row and columns of the matrix
mat_for_clustering <- moa_synergy_mat
mat_for_clustering[is.na(mat_for_clustering)] <- 0.5
diag(mat_for_clustering) <- 0.5
diag(moa_synergy_mat) <- NA

# get clustering order
ht_tmp <- Heatmap(
  mat_for_clustering,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = TRUE,
  show_row_names = FALSE,
  show_column_names = FALSE
)
ht_tmp <- draw(ht_tmp)
row_ord <- row_order(ht_tmp)
```
```{r extract synergy pairs}
idx <- which(moa_synergy_mat == 1, arr.ind = TRUE)

result <- data.frame(
  row = rownames(moa_synergy_mat)[idx[, "row"]],
  col = colnames(moa_synergy_mat)[idx[, "col"]]
)

tmp <- t(apply(result, 1, sort))
result_unique <- unique(as.data.frame(tmp))
colnames(result_unique) <- c("row", "col")
result_unique
```

```{r plotting}
# plot synergy heatmap
col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(0, 0.5, 1),
  c("#F4A259", "grey80", "#2F6DAA")
)

pdf(
  here("figures/figure5/Figure5_MOA_synergy_fraction_heatmap.pdf"),
  width = 18, height = 18
)

ht <- Heatmap(
  moa_synergy_mat,
  name = "Fractional synergistic score\n(≥3/4 metrics)",
  col = col_fun,
  na_col = "grey95",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  row_order = row_ord,
  column_order = row_ord,
  row_labels = moa_labels[row_ord],
  column_labels = moa_labels[row_ord],
  column_names_rot = 45,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  width  = unit(20, "cm"),
  height = unit(20, "cm"),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    at = c(0, 0.5, 1),
    labels = c("0 - Antagonism", "0.5 - Mixed", "1 - Synergy")
  )
)

draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()
```
